relics.description.bloody_voodoo_doll.de: Stitched from coarse fabric and bound with darkened threads, this doll seems to carry someone’s pain within it, having absorbed it along with dried blood. It is made neither for protection nor for decoration — only to bind another’s flesh to its master’s will. Every wound dealt to the marked victim echoes deeper inside the doll, until the accumulated agony bursts outward in a hail of bloody needles. In the hands of one unafraid to work with such charms, the doll becomes an instrument of slow and inevitable retribution.
relics.description.bloody_voodoo_doll.ab: When the relic bearer deals damage to a target, they have a %1$s%% chance to apply Blood Mark to it for 3 seconds. Dealing damage again to a marked target refreshes the effect duration and stores the amount of damage dealt inside the mark. When Blood Mark expires, up to %3$s bloody needles are fired at the target one after another, each dealing %2$s damage per point of stored damage.
Each bloody needle hit restores %4$s health to the relic bearer.
On hit, a bloody needle has a %5$s%% chance to ricochet to the nearest target within %6$s blocks.
If a target dies from a bloody needle, up to %7$s additional needles are released in random directions around it.
+1 experience for each bloody needle released.
+1 experience for each successful bloody needle ricochet.
relics.description.cardiac_trap.descript: A strange device that combines crude mechanics with dark sorcery, as if created for one single purpose — to intercept the very moment of death. At its center pulses a crystal that beats to another creature’s heart rhythm, while thin needles and gears quietly wind with every beat. They say the trap does not save one from death — it merely halts the inevitable for a brief moment, forcing the heart to freeze between two beats. In that instant, the body is still alive, yet already standing on the threshold where every next movement may become the last.
When receiving fatal damage, prevents the relic bearer’s death and applies Heart Stop to them for %1$s seconds. During the effect, the bearer remains in a state close to death and must restore health to avoid dying when it ends. After triggering, the ability goes on cooldown for %2$s seconds.
During Heart Stop, the relic bearer’s health regeneration is increased by %3$s%%.
When the ability triggers, all targets within %4$s blocks are paralyzed for %5$s seconds.
There is a %6$s%% chance that the ability does not go on cooldown after triggering.
+1 experience for each point of damage prevented when the ability triggers.
relics.description.cloak_of_the_bloody_f: A cloak embroidered with crimson feathers, each seemingly soaked in another’s pain. Light at a glance, it trembles ever so slightly with every blow, as if remembering the force and shape of the wound dealt. They say these feathers do not merely absorb suffering — they hone it, turning it into sharp, almost living needles. The moment battle calms for even an instant, the stored fury bursts outward, tearing through the air around the bearer in a chaotic bloody storm.

When the relic bearer takes damage, they have a %1$s%% chance to store %2$s bloody needles in a buffer. If the relic bearer takes no damage for 3 seconds, all stored needles are released one after another around them, dealing %3$s damage to each target hit.
Each hit from a released bloody needle adds 1 extra needle to the buffer.
Killing a target with a bloody needle restores %4$s health to the relic bearer.
Each bloody needle hit applies Bleeding level %5$s to the target for %6$s seconds.
+1 experience for each bloody needle hit.
+1 experience for each bloody needle released.
+1 experience for each extra needle gained through recycling.
+1 experience for each point of health restored by needle execution.
relics.description.flask_of_the_red_mist: A heavy glass flask filled with a dense crimson mist swirling inside, as if breathing with a life of its own. Its movement is slow and viscous, as though unwilling to leave the vessel, yet the moment the stopper loosens, it bursts outward and warps the space around it. They say this mist does not save one from death, but draws them away from it for a moment, allowing them to vanish from the blow and reappear where the enemy least expects.

When receiving fatal damage, prevents the relic bearer’s death and instantly teleports them behind the attacking target, applying the Bloody Step effect. After triggering, the ability goes on cooldown for %1$s seconds.
The target that triggered the ability is blinded for %2$s seconds and loses sight of the relic bearer.
All creatures within %3$s blocks begin treating the ability’s target as their attack target.
The relic bearer’s next attack, performed no later than %4$s seconds after the ability triggers, deals %5$s%% more damage.
+1 experience for each point of damage prevented when the ability triggers.
+1 experience for each extra point of damage dealt by the empowered attack.
Bonus Damage Dealt by Empowered Attack
relics.description.living_flesh.descript: A shapeless lump of flesh bound by thin veins, slowly pulsing in time with another creature’s heart. It does not obey the ordinary laws of life: its surface contracts and stretches, as if listening to the movements around it. The moment its owner wounds a target, the flesh seems to remember it — and begins reaching after it, unwilling to let its prey go.
When dealing damage, the target is marked for %1$s seconds. If the marked target leaves a radius of 16 blocks from the relic bearer before the mark expires, it is affected by Devour, dealing %2$s damage.
Devour damage restores %3$s hunger points and %4$s saturation points to the relic bearer.
Devour damage restores %5$s health to the relic bearer.
If Devour does not kill the target, it can trigger again up to %7$s times with a %6$s%% chance on each trigger.
+1 experience for each point of hunger and saturation restored by Devour.
+1 experience for each point of health restored by Devour.
+1 experience for each additional Devour trigger.
relics.description.mask_of_hunger.descri: An old mask carved from darkened bone and bound with straps that seem to reach for the wearer’s face on their own. Its empty eye sockets are never truly empty — deep within them something stirs, searching for the warmth of other life. They say the mask does not satisfy hunger, but merely changes its form: instead of food, it demands the strength of other creatures. When the bearer’s body weakens, the mask awakens, sinking invisible veins into those nearby and draining life from them, as if trying to feed for two.
relics.description.mask_of_hunger.abilit: When the relic bearer’s health falls below %1$s%%, draining beams are applied to the %3$s nearest targets, dealing %2$s damage to each and restoring health to the relic bearer equal to the damage dealt. After triggering, the ability goes on cooldown for %4$s seconds.
For each target struck by the ability, the relic bearer restores %5$s hunger points and %6$s saturation points.
Each target struck by a draining beam is paralyzed for %7$s seconds.
If at least one target dies from a draining beam, the ability’s cooldown is instantly reset.
+1 experience for each target struck when the ability triggers.
+1 experience for each target that restored hunger and saturation.
+1 experience for each cooldown reset trigger.
relics.description.ring_of_blades.descri: A slender ring adorned with tiny serrated edges that shift almost imperceptibly with every movement of the fingers. It was created by masters who believed that even a missed strike could be turned into a hit, if enough will were poured into it. The ring responds to failed swings, gathering the lost motion within itself and turning it into a flying blade.
relics.description.ring_of_blades.abilit: When a fully charged attack with the main-hand weapon misses, releases a bloody blade in the direction of the bearer’s gaze, dealing %1$s damage to the first target hit.
Each bloody blade hit restores %2$s health to the relic bearer.
The bloody blade deals %3$s%% more damage for each target it hits along its path.
With a %5$s%% chance, up to %4$s blades are released in an arc in front of the relic bearer instead of a single bloody blade.
+1 experience for each bloody blade released.
relics.description.sinner_crown.descript: A heavy crown cast from darkened metal and adorned with twisted spikes, as though forced into it by sheer power. Its inner side is always warm, as if preserving the imprint of those who wore it before. They say it once belonged to a ruler who did not execute his enemies, but made them serve even after death. Every fallen foe becomes part of that procession until the debt is paid.
When killing a target with a humanoid-sized hitbox, a dead one is summoned in its place for %1$s seconds, dealing %2$s damage per hit. No more than %3$s dead ones can exist at the same time.
Kills made by dead ones can also summon new dead ones.
Damage received by the relic bearer is distributed among all dead ones within %5$s blocks, preventing the bearer from taking it.
When a dead one dies or its duration expires, it explodes, dealing %4$s damage to all nearby targets.
+1 experience for each dead one summoned.
+1 experience for each creature killed by a dead one.
+1 experience for each dead one explosion.
+1 experience for each dead one created through lineage.
+1 experience for each point of damage distributed among dead ones.
Damage Dealt by Dead One Explosions
relics.description.slicer.description: A knuckle weapon stitched from living flesh and shards of bone that still twitch faintly beneath the skin. It was neither forged nor carved — it was grown, and it continues to change slowly, adapting itself to its owner’s hand. With every strike, the flesh tightens around it, absorbing force, while the bones within grind against each other as if craving more.
relics.description.slicer.ability.slicer: Allows the relic to be used as a weapon that deals %1$s damage and has %2$s attack speed. Each attack performed no later than %3$s seconds after the previous one grants 1 charge. Each charge increases damage dealt by %4$s%%. The maximum number of charges is %5$s. If the interval between attacks exceeds the allowed window, all charges are instantly lost.
After the combo window ends, charges are not lost instantly and instead decay by 1 per second.
+1 experience for each fully charged attack.

When used, creates an area with a radius of %1$s blocks. Inside the area, the relic bearer becomes invisible, invulnerable, suspended in the air, and loses control of movement. Every %3$s seconds, they teleport behind a random target within the area and strike it. Each target can only be hit once per ability activation. If all targets in the area have already been hit or no living creatures remain, the effect ends. After the effect ends, the ability goes on cooldown for %2$s seconds.
With a %5$s%% chance, a struck target is not considered attacked and can be selected again.
If at least one target is killed during the ability, the list of struck targets is cleared and the interval between attacks is reduced by %4$s seconds.
+1 experience for each attack performed during the ability.
+1 experience for each target killed during the ability.
relics.description.hat_of_omniscience.de: A relic of pure thought. Its power has not yet awakened.
